raw_consumer_statement:
Amex will not credit me for over-billing committed by XXXX for over billing of {$300.00} per month for a gym membership, they also refuse to investigate for the billing issues made by XXXX for the following dates and case numbers in no particular order : XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX card ends in XXXX XX/XX/XXXX XX/XX/XXXX XX/XX/XXXX XX/XX/XXXX XX/XX/XXXX corresponding card number for the charges XXXX I was over-billed for my membership which was only {$330.00}, they charged me an additional {$300.00} per month for the following months listed above. 

I reached out to the business last year XX/XX/XXXXXXXX  - XX/XX/XXXX in regard to the matter, they got back to me XX/XX/XXXXXXXX  via email stating they see the additional {$300.00} charges per month for each month listed above but their systems did not have the capability of reversing the charge. 

I CONSULTED WITH THE BUSINESS FIRST AS AMEX ALWAYS TELLS ITS CLIENTS TO DO AND WAITED FOR XXXX  RESULTS OF THEIR INVESTIGATION, HOWEVER XXXX  TOLD ME I WOULD NEED TO GO TO MY BANK THIS YEAR BUT AMEX WILL NOT DO ANYTHING. 

THEY WERE ABLE TO CREDIT ME FOR XX/XX/XXXXXXXX  BUT NOT THE REST OF THE MONTHS AND THAT MAKES NO SENSE. 

I was directed by a customer service chat representative to make the dispute reason as follows : Ive been charged more than once for the same purchase However, the reason for the dispute is that I was overbilled or overcharged for my membership for the duration of my membership XXXX My membership dues were $ XXXX  monthly for my membership. 
I contacted the XXXX XXXX XXXX in XX/XX/XXXX and XX/XX/XXXX to inquire about them overcharging/overbilling my Amex, despite invoices showing that my monthly rate was {$330.00}. They told me they would have to investigate it and would give me a call back once they had more information. They called me back XX/XX/XXXX and the staff at the gym recommended I dispute the charges with the bank because they see that I was over-billed, but they have no way of reversing the charges on their end. 
I called back XX/XX/XXXX to get more information on why this happened. They confirmed with me that my monthly dues for my membership with XXXX should only be {$330.00} per month. I was told by XXXX  that the {$300.00} charged was for another members dues during that time but due to confidentiality reasons they could not tell me who.
